data.title: Implement gate-2c-test-regression-check.py
data.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2c-test-regression-check.py. The script:
- Reads unified diff from stdin
- Accepts: --intent-aligned (boolean from Gate 1a), --test-dir (path)
- If --intent-aligned -> triggered:false (suppressed per epic SC3)
- Parses diff for changes in test files (test_*.py, *_test.py)
- Detects assertion weakening:
  - Assertion removal: assert*/assertEqual/assertTrue/assertIn etc. line removed
  - Specificity reduction: assertEqual -> assertIn/assertIsNotNone/assertTrue
  - Literal to variable: assertEqual(x, 42) -> assertEqual(x, result)
  - Skip/xfail: @pytest.mark.skip, @pytest.mark.xfail, @unittest.skip additions
- Does NOT trigger for specific->specific: assertEqual(x,42)->assertEqual(x,57), assertEqual(x,"foo")->assertEqual(x,"bar") (same method, both literal values)
- Trigger policy: ANY removal/broadening/skip triggers, regardless of additions
- Emits gate signal JSON: gate_id "2c", signal_type "primary", triggered, evidence, confidence
- Exits 0 always. Python stdlib only (json, sys, re).

TDD: GREEN -- implement until Task 1 tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2c-test-regression-check.py
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/scripts/test_gate_2c_test_regression_check.py -q
- [ ] ruff check
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2c-test-regression-check.py
